mapper.select: SELECT id, property_type, name, sgg_cd, umd_nm, jibun, build_year, latitude, longitude, latest_sale_price, latest_deposit, latest_monthly_rent FROM property WHERE id = #{propertyId}

SELECT id, exclusive_area, land_area, deal_amount, floor, deal_date, buyer_gbn, seller_gbn FROM sale_deal WHERE property_id = #{propertyId} ORDER BY deal_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property ( property_type, name, sgg_cd, umd_nm, jibun, build_year, latitude, longitude, latest_sale_price, latest_deposit, latest_monthly_rent ) VALUES ( #{propertyType}, #{name}, #{sggCd}, #{umdNm}, #{jibun}, #{buildYear}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE property p JOIN ( SELECT property_id, deal_amount FROM sale_deal WHERE (property_id, deal_date) IN ( SELECT property_id, MAX(deal_date) FROM sale_deal GROUP BY property_id ) ) latest_deal ON p.id = latest_deal.property_id SET p.latest_sale_price = latest_deal.deal_amount;

UPDATE property p JOIN ( SELECT property_id, deposit, monthly_rent FROM rent_deal WHERE (property_id, deal_date) IN ( SELECT property_id, MAX(deal_date) FROM rent_deal GROUP BY property_id ) ) latest_deal ON p.id = latest_deal.property_id SET p.latest_deposit = latest_deal.deposit, p.latest_monthly_rent = latest_deal.monthly_rent;
